basic_details.job_title: BEL Project Officer-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) Project Officer-I (Finance) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 02 vacancies have been announced through the BEL Project Officer-I (Finance) Recruitment 2026.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BEL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download BEL Project Officer-I (Finance) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BEL Project Officer-I (Finance) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the BEL Project Officer-I (Finance) positions is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Officer-I (Finance) at BEL?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Project Officer-I (Finance) post in Bharat Electronics Limited.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the Project Officer-I (Finance) role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBA (Finance) from a recognized university, institute, or college to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Officer-I (Finance) position is 32 years as of 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Officer-I (Finance) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary ranging from Rs. 40,000/- to Rs. 55,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for BEL Project Officer-I (Finance) recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 472/- for General and OBC categories. SC/ST candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Officer-I (Finance) posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Project Officer-I (Finance) post is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the direct links to the official notification and the online application form in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110023.
